non_claim_boundaries: This packet does not claim P vs NP.
This packet does not claim a Clay problem solution.
This packet does not claim unrestricted Chronos-RR.
This packet does not claim unrestricted H4.1/FGL.

success_condition: An external reader can identify one public bounded result, its release, its DOI, its Lean module, its verification path, and its non-claim boundary.
